name: Triceps Pushdown (Cable)
setup: Set cable pulley to high position
Grip handle (rope, straight bar, or V-bar)
Elbows pinned to ribs, body upright
execution: Push handle down until arms extended
common_mistakes: Lean over the cable (turn into standing cable row)
cues: Elbows at ribs, don't let them float
Squeeze and hold at the bottom for 1 count
Your hands should finish at your thighs
